original_image_tags: Official seal of the Federal Bureau of Investigation, United States Department of Justice, positioned in the upper left corner.

elements.description: The FBI Department of Justice seal in the upper left corner. Below the seal, text reads 'In Reply, Please Refer to File No.'

judge.reason: Both sides agree on the presence and location of the FBI seal, but description B adds a specific quoted caption text that description A omits, without contradiction.
